title: Court Filing / Case
description: Court case record including parties, filings, and outcomes from a federal or state court docket.

case_number.description: Official case number. Commonly found in: PACER, state court portal, court docket.

court_name.description: Name of the court. Commonly found in: PACER, state court portal.

court_type.description: Type of court. Commonly found in: court portal, case metadata.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction or district. Commonly found in: court portal, case header.

case_type.description: Type of legal case. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal, nature of suit code.

case_title.description: Official case title (e.g., Plaintiff v. Defendant). Commonly found in: PACER, court portal.

filing_date.description: Date the case was filed. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal, docket header.

status.description: Current status of the case. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal.

plaintiffs.description: Plaintiff parties. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal party list.

defendants.description: Defendant parties. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal party list.

judge_name.description: Name of the presiding judge. Commonly found in: PACER, court portal, docket header.

causes_of_action.description: Legal causes of action or claims. Commonly found in: complaint, docket entry, PACER nature of suit.

claim_amount_usd.description: Amount claimed in USD. Commonly found in: complaint, docket filing.

settlement_amount_usd.description: Settlement amount in USD if settled. Commonly found in: settlement filing, press release.

verdict.description: Verdict or judgment description. Commonly found in: judgment order, docket entry.

docket_entries.description: Key docket entries. Commonly found in: PACER docket, court portal docket.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

CaseParty.description: A party involved in the case.

attorney_firm.description: Law firm of the party's attorney.

DocketEntry.description: An entry on the case docket.
